About Bika Banquets

Kolkata's Trusted Partner for Unforgettable Occasions

Since 2016, Bika Banquets has hosted thousands of weddings, receptions, corporate gatherings and family celebrations across three purpose-built venues in Golaghata, Baguiati and Howrah.

What sets us apart is complete in-house control — our own kitchen, our own decorators, our own event team — so every detail stays consistent and accountable, from first enquiry to final farewell.

🍽
In-House Catering
Multi-cuisine, veg & non-veg
💐
Bespoke Décor
Custom floral & thematic setups
🚗
Free Valet Parking
Covered parking at all venues
❄️
Centralised AC
Fully air-conditioned halls
Our Locations

Three Venues, One Standard

View All Venues
01
Flagship Venue

Bika Banquets — Golaghata

76/1 Golaghata Road, Dakshindari, Kolkata 700048

Our flagship hall — centrally air-conditioned with stage, projector, dedicated changing rooms and Havan-friendly setup. Ideal for grand weddings and receptions.

600
Main Hall Floating
02
Indoor Hall + Open Terrace

Bika Rythm — Baguiati

2/4 VIP Road, Raghunathpur, Baguiati, Kolkata 700059

A versatile dual-space venue with a large indoor hall and an open terrace — perfect for sangeet nights and receptions under the open sky. Minutes from the airport.

700
Indoor Hall Floating
600
Open Terrace Floating
03
Elegant Venue on the West Bank

Bika Rangoli — Howrah

Howrah, West Bengal

Our Howrah venue brings the Bika standard across the river — an intimate, elegant setting for weddings, receptions and corporate events on the west bank.

250
Main Hall Floating
What We Do

Every Event, Flawlessly Managed

01

Weddings & Receptions

Full-day packages with mandap, floral décor, bridal entry and multi-cuisine buffet — Bengali, Marwari and North Indian traditions welcomed.

Bengali WeddingsMarwariReception
02

Pre-Wedding Ceremonies

Dedicated setups for Sangeet, Mehndi, Tilak, Haldi and Engagement with thematic décor and live music.

SangeetMehndiEngagement
03

Corporate Events

Conference-ready halls with projector, screens and PA system — ideal for seminars, product launches and AGMs.

SeminarsConferencesDinners
04

Birthdays & Anniversaries

From intimate 50-guest dinners to grand 500-guest celebrations with customised layout, menu and décor.

BirthdaysAnniversariesBaby Shower
05

In-House Catering

Our kitchen handles Bengali spreads, Mughlai cuisine, continental and Jain menus — all prepared fresh on the day.

Veg from ₹700/plateNon-Veg ₹1,300+
06

Décor & Florals

Bespoke floral installations, stage backdrops, LED lighting rigs and themed entryways — no outside decorators needed.

Floral MandapLED LightingEntry Arch

In-House Kitchen

Cuisine That Lingers in Memory

From authentic Bengali fish preparations and rich Mughlai biryanis to continental live counters and pure-veg Jain thalis — our chefs prepare every dish fresh on the day. No outsourced catering, no compromise.

Request a Menu & Quote
Ready to Begin?

Let's Plan Your Perfect Day

Get in touch for a site visit, a detailed quotation or just to check date availability. We respond within a few hours.
